subcodes.first_line: O kind friend, your noble letter was perused with utmost joy, and from its gracious contents [the greatest...] [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار مهربان دستخط شریف بکمال سرور ملاحظه گردید و از مضمون لطیف نهایت
subcodes.subjects: @poems and quotation from poetry, @suffering and imprisonment
